# BP-53 positive: gob.Register does not match encoded payload type
lang: go
file: BP-53-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"encoding/gob"
)

type Message struct {
	ID string
}

type Other struct {
	Name string
}

func encode() error {
	gob.Register(Message{})
	payload := Other{Name: "oops"}
	var buf bytes.Buffer
	enc := gob.NewEncoder(&buf)
	return enc.Encode(payload)
}
